overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character traverses busy streets with towering glass buildings and digital billboards before turning into a covered walkway and emerging into a plaza with a burger restaurant.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown street with digital billboards and pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: crossing yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk at intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across the crosswalk and continuing down the neon-lit street toward the ENDACHI sign

notable_agents.action: futuristic yellow taxi driving past on the street

entered.detail: massive curved screen displaying advertisements with neon colors
large illuminated sign with ENDACHI text spanning across the street ahead
tall building with cyan neon window lighting and reflective glass facade
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a yellow-striped crosswalk on a wide downtown street at night. Massive digital billboards and the prominent ENDACHI sign illuminate the scene with neon light, while a futuristic taxi passes by on the right. Glass office towers with cyan lighting rise on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown street with prominent red structural archway and vehicle traffic

events.description: passing under large red structural arch spanning the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk passing under the red arch structure and alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white coat walking in same direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large red metal framework structure spanning across the street with attached signage
vertical sign with red neon Japanese characters

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the street passing under a massive red structural archway. The ENDACHI sign remains visible ahead while the glass office towers loom closer on the right. A pedestrian in a white coat walks ahead on the left, and various vehicles pass by on the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with glowing cyan neon strips overhead

events.description: turning left off main street into covered walkway with cyan neon lighting
entering darker covered area illuminated by artificial cyan neon strips overhead

agents.ego_description: turning left into a covered pedestrian passage and continuing forward under the neon-lit ceiling

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure with glowing horizontal cyan neon light strips
distant illuminated sign for burger restaurant visible at end of walkway

segments.scene_description: The character turns left off the main street into a covered pedestrian walkway. The environment shifts from open sky to a sheltered corridor illuminated by cyan neon strips overhead. The area is devoid of pedestrians, and a burger restaurant sign becomes visible in the distance at the end of the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with burger restaurant and outdoor dining area

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open plaza with outdoor seating and burger restaurant

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza past outdoor seating areas toward the burger restaurant

entered.detail: restaurant facade with large ALL FOODS signage and giant burger sculpture on roof
white patio umbrellas with metal tables and chairs arranged along the walkway
building with vertical neon signage and glass storefronts

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a plaza featuring the All Foods burger restaurant with a giant burger sculpture on its roof. White outdoor seating umbrellas line the pedestrian area, and neon signs illuminate the surrounding modern buildings. The character walks past the empty patio tables toward the restaurant entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling, neon-lit downtown thoroughfare into a secluded pedestrian plaza. It begins with the character crossing a yellow-striped street beneath massive digital billboards and the glowing ENDACHI sign, while futuristic taxis and cyan-lit glass towers define the urban skyline. As the character moves forward, the scene passes under a massive red structural archway and alongside passing vehicles before turning left away from the main road. The environment then shifts from the open night sky into a sheltered pedestrian walkway illuminated by cyan neon strips, leading the camera through a quiet corridor toward a distant restaurant sign. Finally, the passage opens into a bright plaza featuring the All Foods burger restaurant and its giant rooftop sculpture, with the camera gliding past white outdoor umbrellas and empty patio tables toward the entrance.
